issues.title: Git Cleanup — remover BACKLOG.md/.html do histórico
README Multi-idioma (PT + ES + seletor de idioma)
Tech Writer Review — revisar 3 READMEs
issues.notes:
## README.md (English): APPROVED WITH SUGGESTIONS

Pros: Clear builder-focused tone, excellent structure (tables, diagram, code blocks), all badges/formatting preserved, correct domain terminology (Role, Phase, Layer 0, Checkpoints, Issues, Feature), language selector present.

Cons: 1 minor — 'Process templates' should be 'Workflow templates' per CONTEXT.md domain language (avoid: process).

Fix applied: Changed to 'Workflow templates'.

## README.pt.md (Portuguese): APPROVED WITH SUGGESTIONS

Pros: Natural Brazilian Portuguese, non-mechanical translation, all formatting/code blocks/badges preserved, Phase names and Role names correctly preserved in English, language selector present.

Cons:
1. 'Papel' used instead of domain term 'Role' — table header, body text (4 occurrences fixed)
2. 'Templates de processo' — should be 'Templates de Workflow' (1 fix)

Fixes applied: All terminology violations corrected.

## README.es.md (Spanish): REJECTED (now fixed)

Pros: Natural Spanish translation, good idiom localization, all formatting preserved, language selector present, Phase/Role names preserved.

Cons:
1. 'Rol' used instead of 'Role' — 4 occurrences (fixed)
2. 'Plantillas de proceso' -> 'Plantillas de Workflow' (fixed)
3. SPELLING: 'orquestrador' -> 'orquestador' — Portuguese-influenced error, 4 occurrences (fixed)
4. SPELLING: 'orquestración' -> 'orquestación' — 1 occurrence (fixed)

Fixes applied: All 10 edits applied successfully. Verified with grep — zero remaining instances of incorrect terms.
